earnings.title: Earnings Calculator
earnings.subtitle: Calculate how much you can earn by renting out your car
earnings.pricingDesc: Enter your car details and pricing
details: These calculations are estimates and actual earnings may vary.
Assumes 60% daily, 30% hourly (avg. 4 hours), 10% distance-based rental mix.
Operating costs such as fuel, maintenance, and insurance are not deducted.

gpsTracking.title: GPS Tracking System
gpsTracking.subtitle: Track your vehicles' real-time location
gpsTracking.info: GPS tracking shows vehicle locations in real time. Only cars with GPS devices installed appear in the list.
gpsTracking.noGpsCars: No cars with GPS devices found. Fill in the GPS Device ID when adding a car.

vehicleAlerts.title: Vehicle Alerts
vehicleAlerts.subtitle: Security and status notifications from your vehicles

guide.title: Car Owner Guide
guide.introTitle: Earn by Renting Out Your Car
guide.intro: Earn passive income by renting out your car on RideYo. Let your idle car work for you! Read this guide for a safe, easy, and profitable car sharing experience.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.desc: Sign up for RideYo and select the "Car Owner" role. Complete identity verification.

steps.title: Add Your Car
steps.desc: Upload car details, photos, and documents to the system.

steps.title: Set Pricing
steps.desc: Set your minute, hourly, and daily rental prices.

steps.title: Start Earning
steps.desc: After approval, accept rental requests and start earning!

guide.earningsNote: * Earnings based on ~24 rental days per month. RideYo charges 15% commission.
increaseTips: Take professional photos of your car
Offer a clean and well-maintained car
Get good reviews to boost your rating
insuranceItems: All rentals are covered by RideYo Mini Comprehensive Insurance
Your own policy provides additional protection
Mandatory traffic insurance is required on every vehicle
RideYo manages the process in case of damage
securityItems: All renters pass identity and license verification
Driver score and history are checked
Before and after photos for damage assessment
guide.reservationAcceptDesc: Carefully evaluate incoming reservation requests. Choose auto-accept or manual approval.
reservationAcceptItems: Auto Accept: All qualifying reservations are approved automatically
Manual Approval: You evaluate each reservation individually
Response Time: Respond to requests within 24 hours
guide.availabilityDesc: Keep your availability calendar up to date. Block dates for personal use or maintenance.
availabilityItems: Set special prices for long-term rentals
Different pricing for weekdays and weekends
Adjust prices for holidays and special days
damageSteps: Request damage photos from the renter
Ensure a police report if needed
Get quotes from approved repair shops
guide.lateReturnIntro: If the renter doesn't return on time:
lateReturnItems: Hourly rate calculated automatically after that
guide.communicationIntro: If you can't reach the renter:
communicationItems: Check car location via GPS tracking
documentationItems: Keep all documents up to date
paymentItems: RideYo collects rental payment from renters
Remaining amount transferred within 7 business days
All transactions are invoiced and recorded
guide.taxIntro: Car rental income is taxable. If you rent regularly:
taxItems: You may need to file income tax returns
You can register as a commercial activity
We recommend working with an accountant
guide.supportIntro: Contact our 24/7 support team for any questions or issues.
successItems: ✅ Take good photos — show every angle professionally
✅ Be honest — clearly state flaws and damage
✅ Respond quickly — reply within the first hour
✅ Keep it clean — detailed cleaning after each rental
✅ Be flexible — understanding with pickup/return times
✅ Get good reviews — prioritize customer satisfaction
✅ Regular maintenance — keep your car ready
